summary: Initial state: 14 tests failing. Builder must fix divide() bug and implement gcd() function.

blockers.title: divide() uses floor division instead of true division
blockers.details: The divide function returns integer results instead of floats. divide(5, 2) returns 2 instead of 2.5.
blockers.recommended_fix: Change 'return a // b' to 'return a / b' in divide function
validation_steps: Run pytest and verify TestDivide tests pass

blockers.title: gcd() function not implemented
blockers.details: The gcd function does not exist in mathlib.core. Must implement using Euclid's algorithm.
blockers.expected: gcd function exists and all tests pass
blockers.recommended_fix: Add gcd(a, b) function using Euclid's algorithm with abs() for negative handling
validation_steps: Run pytest and verify TestGcd tests pass

next_actions_for_builder.summary: Fix divide() to use true division (/) instead of floor division (//)
Implement gcd(a, b) function using Euclid's algorithm
